name: staticdrop
description: Publish generated static HTML folders to a tiny public pastebin-style host.

interface.shortDescription: Publish generated static HTML and get a URL.
interface.longDescription: StaticDrop lets Codex publish a local static HTML directory to a small Cloudflare Worker backed by R2, returning a public URL for quick previews and sharing.
defaultPrompt: Publish this generated static site with StaticDrop.
Host the HTML in this folder and give me the URL.
